name: Blueberry Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter well. Line a 9-inch pie pan with the mixture.
3. Bake the crust for 6 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, blend cream cheese, sour cream, and sugar until smooth.
5. Pour the blended mixture into the baked crust.
6. Top with blueberry filling.
7. Sprinkle additional sugar on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes before chilling and serving.
